page.heroTitle: Master Cybersecurity Skills for the Real World
page.heroDescription: Learn incident response, cloud security, pentesting, and digital forensics through structured courses designed for modern teams.
page.welcomeDescription: Pick up your learning path, review your latest progress, and keep your certificates within easy reach.
page.welcomeDescriptionIncomplete: Complete your profile, keep learning, and unlock certificates as soon as you pass certifying courses.
page.heroFallbackTitle: Start with a clear learning path
page.heroFeaturedDescription: Move from essentials to hands-on practice with a structured path designed to keep your progress simple and visible.
page.continueLearningDescription: Pick up where you left off and keep your current momentum.
page.freeDescription: Start with beginner-friendly lessons and build a strong cybersecurity foundation.
page.premiumDescription: Unlock deeper content for advanced practice, premium topics, and professional growth.
page.failedToLoadCourses: Failed to load courses. Please try again later.
page.startedCoursesCopy: Jump back into your latest course from the continue learning rail below.
page.noStartedCoursesCopy: You have not started a course yet. Pick one below and begin your path.
page.certificatesCopy: Your issued certificates are ready in your certificates space.
page.noCertificatesCopy: Pass a certifying final test to unlock your first certificate.
page.profileIncompleteCopy: Add your first and last name so certificates can be issued automatically after you pass.
page.profileReadyCopy: Your profile is ready for certificate generation when you pass a certifying course.
page.focusTitle: Complete your profile to unlock certificates smoothly
page.focusDescription: As soon as you pass a certifying final test, we can issue the certificate automatically if your first and last name are already filled in.

myCourses.title: My Courses
myCourses.subtitle: Find the courses you already started and jump back in quickly.
myCourses.failedToLoad: Failed to load your courses. Please try again later.
myCourses.emptyDescription: You have not started any course yet. Explore the catalog and begin your first learning path.

detail.unableToLoad: Unable to load this course right now.
detail.checkingAccessText: We are checking your access permissions for this part of the course.
detail.loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to unlock the learning content and continue this course.
detail.loginRequiredText: You can view the course overview as a visitor, but you need to login to open the detailed learning content.
detail.loginRequiredPrompt: Please login to open the detailed learning content.
detail.loginRequiredPromptInline: Please <loginLink>login</loginLink> to open the detailed learning content.
detail.premiumRequiredDescription: This lesson belongs to premium content. Please contact the team for access.
detail.premiumRequiredText: Your current plan does not include this premium content. Please contact the BG Defender team if you want to unlock it.
detail.premiumRequiredPrompt: This content is part of the premium plan. Please contact the team for access.
detail.trainingQuizDescription: Answer the chapter quiz below to check what you retained before moving on.
detail.finalTestSidebar: Course-wide assessment unlocked after all chapters
detail.finalTestLocked: Locked until the full course is completed
detail.finalTestLockedDescription: Complete every chapter in this course to unlock the final test.
detail.finalTestUnlockedDescription: You unlocked the final assessment. When you are ready, answer the questions below and reach the required passing score.
detail.finalTestUnavailable: No final test is published for this course yet.
detail.finalTestLoadFailed: Failed to load the final test.
detail.finalTestSubmitFailed: Failed to submit the final test.
detail.finalTestPassedMessage: Excellent work. You passed the course final test.
detail.finalTestFailedMessage: You can review the course and retry the final test whenever you are ready.
detail.certificatePendingDescription: You passed the final test. Complete your profile with your first and last name to generate the certificate automatically.
detail.certificateIssuedDescription: Your certificate is now ready in your certificates space.
detail.quizUnavailable: No training quiz is published for this chapter yet.
detail.quizLoadFailed: Failed to load the training quiz.
detail.quizSubmitFailed: Failed to submit the training quiz.
detail.quizPassedMessage: Nice work. You passed this chapter training quiz.
detail.quizFailedMessage: You can retry this training quiz as many times as you want.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Keep the courses you want to revisit in one simple place.
favorites.failedToLoad: Failed to load your favorites. Please try again later.
favorites.emptyDescription: Star a course from the catalog or the course page and it will appear here.
